name: tachyon-cli
description: Tachyon CLI workflow skills for inspecting Cloud Apps, builds, deployments, logs, and Linear issues.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Tachyon Cloud Apps, builds, logs, and Linear issues.
interface.longDescription: Use the Tachyon CLI to inspect Cloud Apps, build status, deployments, build logs, auth profiles, live Cloud App failures, and Linear issues while redacting secrets from output.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Tachyon CLI skills to inspect Cloud App state or manage Linear issues through Tachyon.
